pi_items.source: Verified from installation scripts that download the Natural Earth zip to this location.
Verified from installation scripts that download the Natural Earth zip to this location and checking the zip contents.
Task instruction specifies creating a field named 'FULL_LABEL'.
Checked shapefile DBF schema directly using pyshp and confirmed 'NAME' field exists.
Checked shapefile DBF schema directly using pyshp and confirmed 'ADM0_A3' field exists.

privileged_info_summary: The environment uses real, non-synthetic GIS data from the public domain Natural Earth project (1:110m resolution countries dataset). The dataset is downloaded to /home/ga/gvsig_data/countries during setup. Independent inspection of the ne_110m_admin_0_countries.dbf schema confirms that the source fields 'NAME' and 'ADM0_A3' exist and are valid. The task requires creating a new field named 'FULL_LABEL'.
